topic: My umbrella is wet by the door every morning, though it has not rained in weeks.
title: My Umbrella Is Wet But It Never Rains | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My umbrella drips by the door each morning, and it has not rained in weeks.
scenes.image_prompt: A closed umbrella propped against a wall by a front door, a dark puddle beneath it, dim hallway light, grainy film, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I live in a dry town where summer cracks the soil.
scenes.image_prompt: A parched suburban street at dusk, cracked dry earth, brown grass, hazy low light, muted color, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I leave the umbrella by the door, always dry.
scenes.image_prompt: A neatly furled umbrella standing in a hallway stand, soft lamp glow, long shadows, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One morning it was soaked through and cold.
scenes.image_prompt: A drenched umbrella leaning by a door, water beading on its fabric, dim grey light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The sky outside was bone dry.
scenes.image_prompt: A cloudless pale dawn sky over dry rooftops seen through a window, dust on the glass, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The water smelled of river silt and old leaves.
scenes.image_prompt: A dark puddle on hallway floorboards with floating bits of leaf, harsh side light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I locked it in a cupboard and waited.
scenes.image_prompt: An umbrella shut inside a wooden cupboard, door ajar, thin slice of light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By dawn the cupboard floor was flooded too.
scenes.image_prompt: Water pooling out from under a cupboard door across a wood floor, dim light, reflection, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Wet footprints began circling the umbrella each night.
scenes.image_prompt: A ring of wet bare footprints around an umbrella on a floor, dim hallway, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One print was small, like a child standing very still.
scenes.image_prompt: A single small wet footprint on dark floorboards, lamp light catching the sheen, grainy film, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I threw the umbrella in the river to be rid of it.
scenes.image_prompt: An umbrella floating away on a dark slow river at dusk, fog over the water, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It was back by my door at dawn, still dripping.
scenes.image_prompt: A wet umbrella propped against a front door again, river water pooling beneath, dim grey light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing
